name: Dallas College - Mountain View Campus
notes: Pell Grant eligible. Short-term workforce certificates and evening/weekend classes available. Formerly Dallas County Community College District (DCCCD).

name: Dallas College - Eastfield Campus
eligibility: Open enrollment; some workforce programs require placement testing
notes: Strong manufacturing and trades programs. WIOA funding accepted through Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas. East Dallas / Mesquite campus.

name: Dallas College - Brookhaven Campus
address: 3939 Valley View Ln, Farmers Branch, TX 75244
notes: North Dallas / Farmers Branch campus. Pell Grant eligible. Day, evening, and weekend course offerings.

name: Dallas College - El Centro Campus
eligibility: Some health programs require pre-requisites and competitive admission
notes: Healthcare-focused Dallas College campus in downtown Dallas. WIOA funding accepted. Near Akard DART rail station.

name: Dallas College - Cedar Valley Campus
notes: Southern Dallas County / Lancaster campus. Strong automotive and diesel programs. WIOA-eligible.

name: Dallas College - Richland Campus
notes: Northeast Dallas campus. Largest campus by enrollment in the Dallas College system. Pell Grant eligible.

name: Texans Can Academies - Dallas Pleasant Grove
eligibility: Ages 14-21, behind in credits or out of school
notes: Free public charter for over-age and under-credited youth. Multiple Dallas-area campuses; Pleasant Grove serves East/Southeast Dallas.

name: Texans Can Academies - Dallas Oak Cliff
eligibility: Ages 14-21, behind in credits or out of school
notes: Free public charter focused on high school completion for at-risk youth. Oak Cliff campus.

name: Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas - Apprenticeship Office
eligibility: Open to Dallas County jobseekers; income-eligible for WIOA tuition support
notes: Coordinates Registered Apprenticeship programs across Dallas County (construction, manufacturing, healthcare, IT). Confirm current cohort openings via the apprenticeship intake line.
